name: Centre Swing 24/7
address: 258 Hogan Blvd suite b, Mill Hall, PA 17751
about: Centre Swing 24/7 is an indoor golf simulator venue that operates year-round, providing access to golf simulation at multiple locations. The venue offers a variety of services including league play, lessons, and event hosting, with a membership program that provides discounts and benefits. Their simulator technology enables play on a range of virtual courses and supports competitive and recreational play through various divisions and formats. The venue is designed for both casual golfers and serious players, offering flexible booking options and a loyalty program to enhance the customer experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Flexible league play with multiple divisions and playoff formats
Data-powered lessons from a PGA professional
Earn 5% cash back through the loyalty program

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy not explicitly stated, but no on-site food or drink offerings mentioned
No mention of alcohol service on-site

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Players need to bring their own golf equipment to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue does not mention food or drink service, suggesting a BYOB policy may be in place.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to complete 18 holes varies depending on the player's pace and course, but indoor golf typically takes 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Centre Swing 24/7 is suitable for families and kids, with leagues and events that cater to various age groups.
